stemHtml:
An aeroplane has a tyre pressure of 16 bars. Assuming a rotating tyre, there is a risk of dynamic hydroplaning as soon as:

1. Water height is more than the depth of the tyre grooves.
2. Speed is greater than 137 kt.
3. Water height is equal to the half of the depth of the tyre grooves.
4. Speed is greater than 117 kt.
